indications.text:
Flo-Pred (prednisolone acetate oral suspension) is indicated in the treatment of the following diseases or
conditions:
1.1 Allergic Conditions
Control of severe or incapacitating allergic conditions intractable to adequate trials of conventional
treatment in adults and pediatric populations with:
